description: Unified project-local skill activation triggers for Claude Code. Controls when skills automatically suggest or block actions in this workspace.

skill-developer.description: Meta-skill for creating and managing Claude Code skills, hooks, prompt templates, settings, commands, agents, and plugin workflow

frontend-dev-guidelines.description: React/TypeScript patterns, Suspense, TanStack Query/Router. For styling use ui-styling skill.

professional-research-writing.description: Professional research writing style for all written content - ALWAYS ACTIVE

pdf-processing-pro.description: Professional PDF processing with OCR, form extraction, and table parsing

chrome-devtools.description: Chrome DevTools debugging and performance analysis

code-refactor.description: Code refactoring patterns and clean code practices

ui-styling.description: shadcn/ui components with Tailwind CSS styling and accessible design patterns

systematic-debugging.description: 4-phase root cause debugging methodology: investigation, pattern analysis, hypothesis testing, implementation

codex.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex CLI for execution, batch refactoring, code generation, multi-file changes, and test writing. Also used for post-implementation code review.

python-patterns.description: Python coding patterns, type hints, dataclasses, async, and best practices

python-testing.description: Python testing with pytest, fixtures, mocking, and TDD

security-review.description: Security review: secrets, input validation, SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, auth, rate limiting

security-scan.description: Scan Claude Code configuration for security vulnerabilities using AgentShield

tdd-workflow.description: Test-driven development: RED-GREEN-REFACTOR cycle with 80%+ coverage

e2e-testing.description: Playwright E2E testing patterns, Page Object Model, CI/CD integration, flaky test strategies

deep-research.description: Multi-source research reports with citations, synthesis, and structured delivery

verification-loop.description: 6-phase verification: build, type check, lint, test, security scan, diff review

strategic-compact.description: Strategic context compaction at logical task boundaries

autoresearch.description: Autonomous ML research loop based on Karpathy's autoresearch framework. Iteratively modifies train.py, runs training, evaluates improvements, keeps or discards via git.

super-ralph.description: Autonomous multi-agent orchestration with test-first development, self-debugging, and learning

gstack.description: Bundled gstack workflow entrypoint exposed through repo-local wrapper skills.

office-hours.description: Pre-development brainstorming and product reframing. YC Office Hours style forcing questions before writing code.

plan-ceo-review.description: CEO/founder product strategy review with scope modes: expansion, hold, reduction.

plan-eng-review.description: Engineering manager architecture review with diagrams, data flow, edge cases, and test matrices.

plan-design-review.description: Senior designer evaluation rating design dimensions 0-10, detecting AI slop.

design-consultation.description: Design partner building complete design systems with competitive research and mockups.

careful.description: Safety guardrails for destructive commands: rm -rf, DROP TABLE, force-push, git reset --hard.

freeze.description: Restrict file edits to a specific directory for the session to prevent accidental changes.

guard.description: Combined safety: activates both /careful and /freeze for maximum protection.

ship.description: Release engineering: sync base, test, coverage audit, version bump, changelog, and release-ready handoff without committing or pushing.

document-release.description: Auto-update project documentation to match shipped changes.

retro.description: Weekly retrospective with metrics, shipping streaks, test health trends.

investigate.description: Systematic root-cause debugging with hypothesis testing. Stops after 3 failed fixes.

review.description: Staff engineer code review finding production bugs that pass CI, with auto-fixes.

design-review.description: Design audit with atomic commit fixes and before/after screenshots.

qa.description: Browser-based QA testing with auto-generated regression tests.

qa-only.description: QA reporting without code changes. Same methodology as /qa but report-only.

browse.description: Real Chromium browser with ~100ms command latency for QA, dogfooding, and site testing.

agentic-engineering.description: Agent development patterns: tool use, agent loops, error handling, context management.

autonomous-loops.description: Continuous agent loop patterns for self-running, iterative agent workflows.

claude-api.description: Claude API and Anthropic SDK patterns for programmatic integration.

deployment-patterns.description: Deployment strategies: CI/CD, staging, rollback, blue-green, canary.

docker-patterns.description: Docker best practices: Dockerfile, multi-stage builds, compose, image optimization.

postgres-patterns.description: PostgreSQL patterns: queries, indexing, migrations, performance, schema design.

eval-harness.description: Evaluation frameworks for testing agent and model quality.

search-first.description: Search-first development: explore existing code before writing new code.

liquid-glass-design.description: Modern glassmorphic UI design: translucent layers, depth, frosted glass effects.

shadcn-ui.description: shadcn/ui component library: CLI, theming, OKLCH colors, composition patterns, registry.

web-artifacts-builder.description: Build self-contained HTML artifacts with React, Tailwind, and shadcn/ui. Bundles into single HTML file.

webapp-testing.description: Test local web applications using Playwright in Python. Browser screenshots, UI debugging, server lifecycle.

gstack-upgrade.description: Upgrade gstack to the latest version. Detects install type, shows changelog.

setup-browser-cookies.description: Import cookies from real browsers into headless browse session for authenticated testing.
